zh.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登
zh.lifeSummary: Mary於大約1543年出生在英國肯特貝嫩登。她於大約1560年與Henry Gibbon在英國肯特貝嫩登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國肯特貝嫩登。

zh-hans.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary于大约1543年出生在英国肯特貝嫩登。她于大约1560年与Henry Gibbon在英国肯特貝嫩登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国肯特貝嫩登。

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Mary was born about 1543, in Benenden, Kent, England. She married Henry Gibbon about 1560, in Benenden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She was buried in Benenden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary est née environ 1543, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Henry Gibbon environ 1560, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elleenterrée à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Mary wurde um 1543 in Benenden, Kent, England geboren. Sie hat um 1560 in Benenden, Kent, England Henry Gibbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie wurde in Benenden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mary è nata il circa 1543 nel Benenden, Kent, England. Lei sposato Henry Gibbon circa 1560, nel Benenden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Fu sepolta a Benenden, Kent, England.

ja.Benenden, Kent, England: イギリスケントベンエンデン
ja.Beneden, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケント
ja.Rolvenden, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントロルベンデン
ja.lifeSummary: Maryは約1543年にイギリスケントベンエンデンで生まれた。約1560年にイギリスケントベンエンデンでHenry Gibbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスケントベンエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary(은)는 대략 1543년 영국 켄트 베니든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1560년 영국 켄트 베니든에서 Henry Gibbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 켄트 베니든에 묻혔다.

mn.Rolvenden, Kent, England: Rolvenden, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Mary nasceu aproximadamente 1543, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Henry Gibbon aproximadamente 1560, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary родилась около 1543 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Gibbon около 1560 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она была похоронена в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Mary nació aproximadamente 1543, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Se casó con Henry Gibbon aproximadamente 1560, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Fue sepultada en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra.
